aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Weatherization Experts due to a lack of structured data and conversational content. They miss opportunities to showcase expertise and answer common queries effectively.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for instructional content
Missing Product schema for insulation services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to home insulation and weatherization in Edmond and Oklahoma City.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with proper schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, case studies, and customer testimonials to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to ChatGPT and other AI models.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup, FAQ content, and authority signals, to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share, leaving them behind if they delay.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: AEO Strategies for Weatherization Experts
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI-driven search engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
